'''Virtrol Devin''' was a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] serving under [[Drek Drednar]]. Virtrol was Drednar's security expert and also the leader of Drednik's boarding team. Devin was typically armed with a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] and a [[Vibroknife/Legends|vibroknife]], and carried a [[Breath mask/Legends|breath mask]], [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]], and [[Security kit/Legends|security bypass kit]].<ref name="SD" />
